Versions

Vector: 1.11.0
Sys11: 1.10.0
WPC: 1.7.0
EM: 1.6.0
WhiteStar: 0.5.0
DataEast: 1.0.0

What's Changed

New features

  • Switch Diagnostics see out video about them here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FLIX7n9jNf4
  • Wi‑Fi signal strength shows up in admin page by @mullinmax in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/271
  • Special play formats by @paulmullin in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/276
  • Onboard led driver (for WS2812) by @paulmullin in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/232

Data East support:

The first Data East Boards are now available for purchase!

  • Add Data East Game support by @paulmullin in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/212
  • Config file cleanup for Data East games by @paulmullin in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/287
  • Onboard Rgb led support for data east by @paulmullin in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/265

Documentation

  • Added new documentation site with reworked manuals and details https://docs.warpedpinball.com/
  • Enable dark mode in documentation site by @mullinmax in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/250
  • Add automatic API docs generation for backend routes by @mullinmax in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/227
  • Add Data east manual by @paulmullin in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/282

Bug fixes and Tweaks

  • WPC Initials Capture by @paulmullin in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/286
  • Move game-end hold handling to web UI by @mullinmax in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/251
  • saved 10Kb of storage with hand-cleaned logo by @mullinmax in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/226
  • Fix race condition in scores page initialization by @Copilot in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/280
  • Rename tournament column "Rank" to "Order" by @Copilot in https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/pull/292

Full Changelog: https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/compare/1.10.0...1.11.0

Versions

Vector: 1.11.10
Sys11: 1.10.2
Sys11 (Tiny): 1.10.2
WPC: 1.7.5
EM: 1.6.4
WhiteStar: 0.5.0
DataEast: 1.0.4

This release focuses on reliability, performance improvements, and expanded game support. Several internal improvements were also made to make configuration updates safer and easier to maintain.

Improvements

  • Reduced update memory usage. #307
  • Improved flash storage efficiency. #312
  • Config bundles are now distributed as deflate-compressed .z files to reduce download and storage size. #310
  • Cleanup and improvements to origin support. #301

Game Support & Configuration Updates

  • Added configuration for Fish Tales (L5 ROM). #299
  • Adjustments support for several Data East and Williams System 11 games. #298
  • Added System 11 frame mapping support. #313
  • Added OneBall format and fixes for initials collection. #306
  • Improved ID to name conversion for score format selection. #305

Documentation & User Resources

  • Updated README badges and documentation links. #297
  • Added documentation reference for the API over USB feature. #297
  • Updated Warped Pinball YouTube link on the About page. #294
  • Added updated phone screen capture images to the docs. #320

Build & Developer Tooling

  • Modularized and documented the game feature CSV exporter. #289
  • Automated regeneration of special feature CSV data. #296
  • CI validation for JSON configuration files. #281
  • Added PR guard for required version bumps. #295
  • Automatic patch version bumps in CI workflows. #300

Full Changelog: https://github.com/warped-pinball/vector/compare/1.11.8...1.11.10
